mantras: you are allowed to move slowly
nothing here needs you to hurry back
stillness is also a movement, done well
your shoulders were never meant to carry your inbox
breath first. everything else is optional.
the spine remembers how to be a wave
you are the only instrument you were given — tune it kindly
rest is not a reward. it does not need to be earned.
slowness is a skill. you are practicing it now.
let the screen wait. it is good at waiting.
the neck turns so the view can change
small movements, honestly done, are enough
you have carried your head all day. thank it.
tension is a message, not a sentence
the light comes back when you look for it slowly
what you release here, you do not have to pick up again
your body is not late for anything right now
gravity is doing its part. you can do yours gently.
what the water erases was heavy anyway
five minutes of care is still care
